entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange within the C-Patex ecosystem, focused on Latin American users and offering spot trading, quick exchange, buy-and-sell tools, and related crypto services.
entity.notes: The official site describes C-Patex Exchange as a centralized platform focused on the LATAM region. Launch date remains null because this review did not recover a sufficiently precise launch marker.

evidence.title: C-Patex Exchange official website
evidence.notes: Official site presents active account creation and trading functions and describes the exchange platform and LATAM focus.

evidence.title: C-Patex exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory reference used to corroborate the C-Patex exchange identity.
